name: PM-KISAN
target_description: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land as per state land records
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Department of Agriculture, Cooperation & Farmers' Welfare
data_source: PM-KISAN Revised Operational Guidelines dated 21.06.2019 + Clarification on Clauses 3.3 and 3.4

rules.description: Applicant must own cultivable land as per state land records
rules.ambiguity_note: Lease and sharecrop arrangements are ambiguous — land must be registered in applicant's name in state land records

rules.description: Excludes: constitutional post holders, Ministers/MPs/MLAs, govt employees (EXCEPTION: Class IV/Multi-Tasking Staff/Group D workers ARE eligible), pensioners >=₹10k/month (same exception applies), income tax payers, and actively practicing professionals (doctor/lawyer/CA/engineer/architect with registered practice).
rules.ambiguity_note: IMPORTANT EXCEPTION: Class IV/Multi-Tasking Staff/Group D government employees (peons, sweepers, gardeners) ARE eligible for PM-KISAN if they own farmland. This engine cannot distinguish Group D from other govt employees — if you are Group D, verify at pmkisan.gov.in despite this FAIL result. Also: practicing professionals (registered doctor/lawyer/CA) are excluded but not tracked separately.

rules.description: Bank account must be seeded with Aadhaar for DBT transfer
Applicant must have an Aadhaar card for identity verification

benefit_summary: ₹6,000/year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 (April-July, August-November, December-March) via DBT

application_offices.find_instruction: Your village Gram Panchayat. Ask your Sarpanch for help.
Find the nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in
